grader.criterion: Regression and red-team suites cover auth, hierarchy, murals, sharing, exports, templates, search, collaboration runtime, and widgets.
The Users family regression tests cover both symmetric cases (room membership lifecycle) and the asymmetric case (updatemuralmemberpermissions uses userId in path, not body).
A PHP-example regression test is present to guard against reintroduction of the $payload = {...} syntax defect.
